meaning: v.(使)倾斜,(使)翘起,以言词或文字抨击
examples: The second movement involved in the hypothesis has to do with axial tilt.
The table is at a slight tilt.
He answered with a tilt of his head.
As for the value tilt, it s there, but it can t explain his superior results.
The "tilt" mechanism, disqualifying scores boosted by jostling the game, was introduced in 1934.
